message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
  ActorBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  ActorBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
  ParticipantBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  ParticipantBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
  LifeLineBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  LifeLineBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
}

actor "user" as User
participant "GStreamer Pipeline" as GSPipeline
participant "realsensesrc" as RSsrc
participant "librealsense2" as libRS
participant "GStreamer" as GST

note left of User: load Gst pipeline with realsensesrc

User -> GSPipeline: realsensesrc serial=728..
activate GSPipeline

box "pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY" #LightYellow
  GSPipeline -> RSsrc: create
  activate RSsrc
  
  RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::context.query_devices()
  activate libRS
  libRS --> RSsrc: rs2::device_list
  deactivate libRS
  
  RSsrc -> libRS: select device by serial
  activate libRS
  note right of libRS: Select device
  libRS --> RSsrc: rs2::sensor
  deactivate libRS
  
  rect rgb(240,240,240)
    label loop [for (info: rs2::rs2_camera_info)]
    RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::device.supports(info)
    activate libRS
    libRS --> RSsrc: bool
    deactivate libRS
    
    RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::device.get_info(info)
    activate libRS
    libRS --> RSsrc: const char* info_string
    deactivate libRS
    RSsrc -> RSsrc: store info
  end
    
  RSsrc -> GST: gst_tag_setter_add_tag_valist_values(...,infos, NULL)
  activate GST
  note right of GST: Register per-stream metadata as Gst tags
  GST --> RSsrc
  deactivate GST
  
  RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::sensor.get_stream_profiles()
  activate libRS
  libRS --> RSsrc: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>
  deactivate libRS
  
  rect rgb(240,240,240)
    label loop [for (profile: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>)]
    RSsrc -> RSsrc: Create profile_list of supported profiles
  end
  
  RSsrc -> GST: g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
  activate GST
  note right of GST: Install all supported video profiles as an option
  GST --> RSsrc
  deactivate GST
  
  rect rgb(240,240,240)
    label loop [for (option: rs2::rs2_option)]
    RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::sensor.supports(option)
    activate libRS
    libRS --> RSsrc: bool
    deactivate libRS
    
    RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::sensor.get_option_range
    activate libRS
    libRS --> RSsrc: rs2::option_range
    deactivate libRS
    RSsrc -> RSsrc: store option
  end
  
  RSsrc -> GST: g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
  activate GST
  note right of GST: Install all supported RS camera options as properties/options
  GST --> RSsrc
  deactivate GST
  
  RSsrc ..> GST: gst_bus_add_watch(bus, bus_call...);
  note right of GST: Register callback for parameter changes
end box

GSPipeline -> RSsrc: caps negotiation (CAPS)
note right of RSsrc: - pixel_format\n- width\n- height\n- framerate

box "pipeline goto GST_STATE_PLAYING" #LightYellow
  GSPipeline -> RSsrc: state=playing
  RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::sensor.start()
  activate libRS
end box

box "pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY" #LightYellow
  RSsrc -> libRS: rs2::sensor.stop()
  deactivate libRS
end box

deactivate RSsrc
deactivate GSPipeline

@enduml
```
